autor: I'm not bringing anything magical to it. Ninety percent of inventing is putting in the hours and just trying. You don't need to make a big leap—you - need to take a thousand small steps.

You don't need to make a big leap—you - need to take a thousand small steps. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We're all innately creative” articula reflexao, james-jorash, innately em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
